name: lt. simon 'ghost' riley
description:
♡ omegaverse ♡

or

the taskforce receives a new member of the pack, a bloody omega. ghost doesn't like omega's.

Omega's were weak, often not allowed in the military or jobs in general- a sentiment Ghost agreed with. Why would they need to be around in the military? Their heats, nesting and frail bodies were no match for the resilience needed in the military.. Perhaps it was that pesky 'Omega Collective', some 'freedom fighter' group in parliament which tried to advocate for Omega's rights. Ghost could only turn his face away and sneer. Like hell he needed a distraction, he was fine with having two alphas and two betas in the pack already.

omega user
